generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why some people worry about civil defense spending, but let's be real - in today's world, being prepared isn't about paranoia, it's about responsibility. My neighbor lost everything in the 2025 Midwest blackouts. If we'd had better emergency systems in place, maybe their family wouldn't still be displaced. It's not about living in fear, it's about having basic protections when things go wrong. #CommunityResilience #SafetyFirst
